_provenance: schema-derived from compute_vwap_breakdown_update return signature (math_engine.py:374) and alpha_bot_execution.py:888-889 (new_vwap_ticks written back before grace gate). Inputs chosen to make conditions True on every cycle. No producer-computed floats — tick counts are integers, threshold is a named constant (VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS).
description: Pins that vwap_ticks accumulates during grace (grace suppresses fire, not accumulation). A symphony with VWAP conditions continuously True for N grace cycles will have N ticks built up and fire on the first post-grace cycle where ticks >= VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS.
expected_behavior: after N in-grace cycles, vwap_ticks = N (not reset). At post-grace cycle N+1, is_vwap_broken=True (ticks >= VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS=3). This is intentional: grace suppresses fire, not the state machine tick counter.
note: VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS=3 is a named constant in math_engine.py — do not hardcode 3 in the test assertion; read math_engine.VWAP_BREAK_CONFIRM_TICKS.
